verses.text: A man's issue makes him unclean. Issue. Bodily flux defiles.
A man's issue makes him unclean. Issue. Bodily flux defiles.
A man's issue makes him unclean. Issue. Bodily flux defiles.
Whatever he lies or sits on is unclean. Spreading. His uncleanness touches all.
Whatever he lies or sits on is unclean. Spreading. His uncleanness touches all.
Whatever he lies or sits on is unclean. Spreading. His uncleanness touches all.
Whatever he lies or sits on is unclean. Spreading. His uncleanness touches all.
Whoever he touches must wash and is unclean till evening. Touched. Defilement passes by contact.
Whoever he touches must wash and is unclean till evening. Touched. Defilement passes by contact.
Whoever he touches must wash and is unclean till evening. Touched. Defilement passes by contact.
Whoever he touches must wash and is unclean till evening. Touched. Defilement passes by contact.
Whoever he touches must wash and is unclean till evening. Touched. Defilement passes by contact.
When healed, he washes and brings two birds for offering. Cleansed. Atonement restores him.
When healed, he washes and brings two birds for offering. Cleansed. Atonement restores him.
When healed, he washes and brings two birds for offering. Cleansed. Atonement restores him.
Issues of seed make both unclean till evening. Defiled. Cleansing by washing follows.
Issues of seed make both unclean till evening. Defiled. Cleansing by washing follows.
Issues of seed make both unclean till evening. Defiled. Cleansing by washing follows.
A woman's separation makes her unclean seven days. Separation. Her flux defiles for a time.
A woman's separation makes her unclean seven days. Separation. Her flux defiles for a time.
A woman's separation makes her unclean seven days. Separation. Her flux defiles for a time.
What she touches is unclean. Spreading. Defilement reaches others.
What she touches is unclean. Spreading. Defilement reaches others.
What she touches is unclean. Spreading. Defilement reaches others.
A longer issue keeps her unclean. Long issue. Defilement lingers.
A longer issue keeps her unclean. Long issue. Defilement lingers.
A longer issue keeps her unclean. Long issue. Defilement lingers.
When healed, she washes and brings offerings. Cleansed. Atonement is made.
When healed, she washes and brings offerings. Cleansed. Atonement is made.
When healed, she washes and brings offerings. Cleansed. Atonement is made.
Keep them from defiling the tabernacle; this is the law. Separated. Uncleanness must not touch the holy.
Keep them from defiling the tabernacle; this is the law. Separated. Uncleanness must not touch the holy.
